AI governance is moving out of policy decks and into operating routines inside enterprise teams.

Bloomberg reports that buyers now ask who can pause a rollout, who signs off on changes, and how incidents are reviewed.

Before it's here, it's on the Bloomberg Terminal.

That pushes platform groups toward workflow review points, rollback ownership, and incident drills instead of slideware.

Sign up for the New Economy Daily

Executives increasingly treat AI deployment discipline as a measurable operating capability rather than a research milestone.
